source: Menu boards crawled from hydbiryanihouse.com/menu, transcribed 2026-07-05
notes: All menu items may contain Nuts / Dairy
Groups of 5 or more will be charged an automatic gratuity of 18%
Automatic gratuity of 18% for checkouts after hours of restaurant timings
Any breakage in the Restaurant's products will be charged for Replacement / Reinstallation
A 4% checkout fee will be charged for credit card usage
